name: alice-browse
description: alice browse skill — headless Chromium daemon for agent-driven QA.

scripts.build: bun build --compile src/cli.ts --outfile dist/browse && bun build --compile src/find-browse.ts --outfile dist/find-browse && bash scripts/build-node-server.sh && chmod +x dist/browse dist/find-browse && rm -f .*.bun-build || true
